name: Owner Reservation Request Sender - De Paseo en Fincas

parameters.query:
insert into public.owner_reservation_requests (
  conversation_id,
  chatwoot_id,
  selected_finca_id,
  selected_finca_name,
  selected_finca_snapshot,
  recipient_phone,
  phone_source,
  template_name,
  reminder_template_name,
  template_language,
  status,
  error_message,
  payload,
  updated_at
)
values (
  {{ "'" + String($json.conversation_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ $json.chatwoot_id ? "'" + String($json.chatwoot_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.selected_finca_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.selected_finca_name || $json.selected_finca_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.selected_finca_snapshot || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" }},
  {{ $json.recipient_phone ? "'" + String($json.recipient_phone).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ $json.phone_source ? "'" + String($json.phone_source).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.template_name || 'solicitud_reserva').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.reminder_template_name || 'solicitud_reserva_reminder').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ "'" + String($json.template_language || 'es_CO').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  'failed',
  {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + String($json.error_message).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "'owner_reservation_request_invalid'" }},
  {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" }},
  now()
)
returning id, status, error_message;

with input as (
  select
    {{ "'" + String($json.conversation_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as conversation_id,
    {{ $json.chatwoot_id ? "'" + String($json.chatwoot_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }}::text as chatwoot_id,
    {{ "'" + String($json.selected_finca_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as selected_finca_id,
    {{ "'" + String($json.selected_finca_name || $json.selected_finca_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as selected_finca_name,
    {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.selected_finca_snapshot || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::jsonb as selected_finca_snapshot,
    {{ "'" + String($json.recipient_phone).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as recipient_phone,
    {{ $json.phone_source ? "'" + String($json.phone_source).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }}::text as phone_source,
    {{ "'" + String($json.template_name || 'solicitud_reserva').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as template_name,
    {{ "'" + String($json.reminder_template_name || 'solicitud_reserva_reminder').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as reminder_template_name,
    {{ "'" + String($json.template_language || 'es_CO').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as template_language,
    {{ "'" + String($json.send_after_at).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::timestamptz as send_after_at,
    {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::jsonb as payload
),
inserted as (
  insert into public.owner_reservation_requests (
    conversation_id,
    chatwoot_id,
    selected_finca_id,
    selected_finca_name,
    selected_finca_snapshot,
    recipient_phone,
    phone_source,
    template_name,
    reminder_template_name,
    template_language,
    status,
    send_after_at,
    payload,
    updated_at
  )
  select
    input.conversation_id,
    input.chatwoot_id,
    input.selected_finca_id,
    input.selected_finca_name,
    input.selected_finca_snapshot,
    input.recipient_phone,
    input.phone_source,
    input.template_name,
    input.reminder_template_name,
    input.template_language,
    'pending_send',
    input.send_after_at,
    input.payload,
    now()
  from input
  on conflict (conversation_id, selected_finca_id, recipient_phone)
  where recipient_phone is not null
    and status in ('pending_send', 'initial_sent', 'reminder_sent')
  do nothing
  returning *
)
select * from inserted;

update public.owner_reservation_requests
set
  status = 'initial_sent',
  initial_provider_message_id = {{ $json.provider_message_id ? "'" + String($json.provider_message_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  initial_sent_at = now(),
  error_message = null,
  payload = coalesce(payload, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
    'owner_chatwoot_inbox_id', {{ Number($json.owner_chatwoot_inbox_id || 0) || 'null' }},
    'owner_chatwoot_contact_id', {{ Number($json.owner_chatwoot_contact_id || 0) || 'null' }},
    'owner_chatwoot_source_id', {{ $json.owner_chatwoot_source_id ? "'" + String($json.owner_chatwoot_source_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
    'owner_chatwoot_conversation_id', {{ Number($json.owner_chatwoot_conversation_id || 0) || 'null' }},
    'owner_chatwoot_message_id', {{ Number($json.owner_chatwoot_message_id || 0) || 'null' }},
    'owner_chatwoot_inbox_name', {{ $json.owner_chatwoot_inbox_name ? "'" + String($json.owner_chatwoot_inbox_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
    'owner_chatwoot_inbox_phone', {{ $json.owner_chatwoot_inbox_phone ? "'" + String($json.owner_chatwoot_inbox_phone).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
    'owner_template_transport', 'chatwoot'
  ),
  updated_at = now()
where id = {{ Number($json.id) }}
returning *;

update public.owner_reservation_requests
set
  status = 'failed',
  error_message = {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + String($json.error_message).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "'owner_initial_template_failed'" }},
  updated_at = now()
where id = {{ Number($json.id) }}
returning id, status, error_message;

selected_finca.descripcion_corta: Hermosa finca en Carmen de apicala, cuenta con un total de 4 habitaciones, Piscina, Jacuzzi, Bbq, Wifi, Tv, Billar, Totalmente privada para que disfrutes tus vacaciones.
selected_finca.caracteristicas_originales: Hermosa finca en Carmen de apicala, cuenta con un total de 4 habitaciones, Piscina, Jacuzzi, Bbq, Wifi, Tv, Billar, Totalmente privada para que disfrutes tus vacaciones.
